title: Record soft55 reserved26k and 2-line result previews
prompt: Create reports/soft55-reserved26-resultpreview2.md with sections for Soft 55, Reserved 26k, Result preview 2, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft55 Reserved26 ResultPreview2 Contract

## Soft 55
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.55 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Reserved 26k
reserved context headroom defaults to 26k tokens for denser usable window before hard block

## Result preview 2
TUI tool result previews default to 2 lines for denser chrome without expand

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/tool-call vitest
